description: Lightweight inventory probe: returns workspace info, item counts by type, and scan timing without building the full relationship graph. Ideal for agents to assess workspace size before committing to a full scan.

data.hint: Use --deep and --include-connections for relationship discovery. Use --focus <id> to get a targeted subgraph.

notes: This is the cheapest context tenant operation — only calls workspace resolution + item listing (2 API calls per workspace). No type-specific detail fetching, no definition scanning, no connection fetching. Agents should use this first to decide whether to do a full scan or a focused query.

query_examples.description: Total number of items in workspace.
